memory:memory/2026-04-10.md:1:14.snippet: # 2026-04-10 - ClawPass Fixes ## Fixed Today - **Critical bug**: `save_vault_to_disk` in commands.rs was using `VAULT_FILE` constant instead of `get_vault_path()`. This caused entries to not persist because the vault was being saved to the wrong directory. - Changed: `fs::write(VAULT_FILE, &encrypted)` → `fs::write(get_vault_path()?, &encrypted)` - This should fix the "entries disappear after save" issue. ## Created - `C:\Users\Reno\Documents\password-manager\ClawPass\TODO.md` with comprehensive status and remaining issues. ## Notes - Reno wants to continue with ClawPass fixes when ready. - Gateway config for LM Studio still has issues (separate from ClawPass).

memory:memory/2026-04-26.md:1:36.snippet: # 2026-04-26 - ClawPass Sync Investigation ## Session Focus Working on ClawPass iOS sync functionality - specifically entry merge logic so entries received from desktop sync are properly merged into the iOS vault. ## Critical Findings ### Root Cause of Broken Sync The desktop TCP sync server has **TWO SEPARATE VAULTS** that are never synchronized: 1. **AppState.vault** (Tauri state) - Populated when vault is unlocked via `unlock_vault` command. Contains actual entries. 2. **sync_tcp's vault** - `Arc<RwLock<Vec<VaultEntry>>>` initialized as empty `Vec::new()` in main.rs. Never gets populated! ```rust // main.rs creates EMPTY separate vault for sync_tcp let vault = Arc::new
